--- SOURCE 1: Lessons learned of project Milestone: The first 3D printed concrete ... ---
URL: https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S2214785323035770

SUMMARY:
Project Milestone consists of a series of five 3D printed residential houses in the Netherlands, of which the first was opened in 2021 and is currently inhabited . The structural principle is based on 3D printed load-bearing concrete wall elements, which are curved in- and out-of-plane.



--------------------------------------------------------------------------------


--- SOURCE 2: Project - Project Milestone - 3dprintedhouse ---
URL: https://www.3dprintedhouse.nl/en/project-info/project-milestone/

SUMMARY:
The 3D concrete printed houses are in Bosrijk in the new housing estate Meerhoven, Eindhoven. A high level of ambition in terms of sustainability and spatial



--------------------------------------------------------------------------------


--- SOURCE 3: First tenants move into 3D-printed home in Eindhoven - Dezeen ---
URL: https://www.dezeen.com/2021/05/06/3d-printed-home-project-milestone-eindhoven/

SUMMARY:
A boulder-shaped concrete house in the Netherlands has become the first lived-in 3D-printed home in the country after its tenants received the key on April 30.



--------------------------------------------------------------------------------


--- SOURCE 4: Project Milestone: 3D-Printed Home by Houben & Van Mierlo ---
URL: https://parametric-architecture.com/project-milestone-3d-printed-home-by-houben-van-mierlo/?srsltid=AfmBOorj6I9N_kkAzjcstt71pds5yXlbmAKltl4Nq6eUTaGWhGrmREpE

SUMMARY:
Dutch architects Houben and Van Mierlo conceive a boulder-shaped a concrete house (Project Milestone) in the Netherlands.

URL: https://3dprinting.com/news/multi-floor-3d-printed-homes-take-shape-in-the-netherlands/

SUMMARY:
The project will consist of four homes, divided into two models. The first design will span three floors with a total floor space of 127 square

enriched_points.expanded_content: Project Milestone marked a significant milestone as the first series of 3D-printed homes in the Netherlands, with the inaugural home completed in 2021.
The architectural design, characterized by curved, boulder-shaped structures, seamlessly integrates aesthetics and functionality, showcasing innovative 3D printing capabilities.
Project Milestone navigated Dutch building regulations, ensuring safety and sustainability, thereby setting a precedent for future 3D-printed construction projects.
